title: salix sphenophylla subsp. pseudotorulosa
intro: Salix sphenophylla subsp. pseudotorulosa, also known as the Sichuan willow, is a plant species belonging to the willow family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and skin infections. The health benefits of Salix sphenophylla subsp. pseudotorulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared in herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
